title: Tom Canchola Contact + Rankett / Live-Betting Todos
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note auto-titled by the first line: an email contact — [REDACTED EMAIL: tom canchola @ icubellic dot com] — followed by three operational todos for Rankett and Swipr.
  • Introduces Tom Canchola to the corpus as a stub — apparent client/contact at icubellic.com (likely an Austin-area digital marketing agency or restaurant group given the Rankett fulfillment fit).
  • The todos: end-to-end test the Rankett fulfillment pipeline, redesign the GBP audit screen (likely the AI search optimization tool's grub/GBP score interface) on paper, and pull the live-betting framework from Elijah for Swipr.
  • First in-corpus reference to Yahir building a "live betting" mechanism for Swipr based on Elijah Leach's framework — extends the fantasy/sportsbetting interest into a productized direction.
  • Confirms cross-pollination between the two active 2026 projects: Rankett (AI search audit) and Swipr (session-based accuracy betting) share Yahir's todo surface.

Notes

Source body, in full:

  • "HOME / HOM" — likely a Google Business Profile audit section header Yahir was prototyping (HOME tab on the audit screen), or an aborted note-naming attempt.
  • "End to end test fulfillment" — the Rankett delivery pipeline needs to be walked through start-to-finish; pairs with the Rankett.com note todos around whitelabel reports and trigger-on-new-tab T&C flow.
  • "Resdeign gurb screen on paper" — almost certainly "Redesign GBP screen on paper," referring to the Google Business Profile audit interface (the share of voice / audit tool). The "on paper" specification is interesting — Yahir defaulting to pencil for layout work before code.
  • "Get mechanism and frame work for live betting from elijah" — promotes Elijah Leach from "friend whose mantras Yahir collects" to technical collaborator on Swipr's live-betting layer. Live betting is a higher-complexity bet category than the session-based accuracy bets Swipr was designed around; pulling Elijah's existing framework is a force-multiplier move.

The title-as-email-contact is a recurring pattern in Yahir's Apple Notes — same ergonomics as the Rdudejr@gmail.com note: paste an email address, jot todos beneath it, let the contact email serve as the note's filing index. Tom Canchola's domain (icubellic.com) doesn't appear elsewhere in the corpus — promotion to a stub is conservative but warranted by the operational context (Yahir is treating him as a sufficiently-real contact to file todos under his name).

Connections

rankett · swipr · tom canchola · elijah leach · ai search optimization · share of voice · whitelabel strategy · 2026 01 13 rankett com · 2026 02 09 swipr session based accuracy betting
